title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 402.142 - Federal acts, effect of
text:
402.142.  Federal acts, effect of. — As authorized in 15 U.S.C. 7002, as amended, sections 402.130 to 402.148 modify, limit, or supersede* the federal Electronic Signatures in Global and National Commerce Act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7001, et seq., but do not modify, limit, or supersede 15 U.S.C. Section 7001(a), or authorize electronic delivery of any of the notices described in 15 U.S.C. Section 7003(b).
(L. 2009 H.B. 239) 
*Words "modifies, limits, or supersedes" appear in original rolls.
